name: Maple Ridge Distribution Substation
description: 138 kV → 13.2 kV distribution substation feeding 8,000 customers. Three-phase voltage + current monitoring, breaker status, transformer oil temp. Real systems would speak DNP3 + IEC 61850; this lab speaks Modbus for hands-on exercises.
purdue_l1_role: Substation IED — feeder protection + breaker control

regulatory.name: NERC CIP-002 — CIP-014
regulatory.scope: Critical Infrastructure Protection — physical + cyber, mandatory for BES owners

regulatory.name: DOE C2M2
regulatory.scope: Cybersecurity Capability Maturity Model — energy sector

risks.name: Setpoint manipulation of protective relay
risks.note: Disable overcurrent protection, transformer fault becomes catastrophic

risks.name: GOOSE / Sampled Values spoofing (IEC 61850)
risks.note: Layer-2, no auth — Ukraine 2015 used a variant

risks.name: Lateral movement from corp IT to OT
risks.note: Most utilities lack proper OT/IT segmentation

risks.name: Vendor remote-access compromise
risks.note: Vendors often have permanent VPN tunnels

steps.title: Normal operation
steps.body: Bus voltage is steady at ~13.2 kV. The 52A breaker shows CLOSED. Feeder current ~320 A. This is a healthy substation.

steps.title: Issue malicious write
steps.body: Write coil 0 = 0 to sensor-sim — that's a forced breaker open command. In the real world this would drop power to 8,000 customers.

steps.title: Watch the wire
steps.body: FC5 (write coil) frame on the wire. In a real DNP3 substation this would be the pivotal forensic packet.

steps.title: Detection signal
steps.body: Synoptic shows breaker OPEN. In a real plant, SCADA alarms cascade — operators see relay tripped, current zero, customers calling.

steps.title: Restore
steps.body: Clear sensor-sim overrides. Breaker closes, current returns. The historical pcap is your incident evidence package.

steps.title: Inject heartbeat freeze
steps.body: Click Pause heartbeat. Substation-side heartbeat freezes — control center loses live state.

steps.title: Watchdog trips
steps.body: softplc-1's ST detects 3 s of frozen heartbeat — link_ok→0, link_loss++. In a real plant: control center alarm, operator dispatches a truck.

steps.title: Recover
steps.body: Clear all faults. Link returns. The link_loss counter is your forensic record of how many times this happened.
